scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/assets dist/about dist/contact dist/blog dist/privacy dist/terms && cp index.html dist/ && cp about.html dist/about/index.html && cp contact.html dist/contact/index.html && cp blog.html dist/blog/index.html && cp privacy.html dist/privacy/index.html && cp terms.html dist/terms/index.html && cp arivo.css main.js form-config.js robots.txt sitemap.xml dist/ && cp -R assets/* dist/assets/
